/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import ConditionSet, Contains, ImageSet, Interval, Lambda, Rational, S, Symbol, asin, pi
x, y, n = map(Symbol, 'xyn')
for expr in [n*pi, n*pi + asin(y), 2*n*pi + asin(y), n**2 + y, n*y + pi]:
    base = ImageSet(Lambda(n, expr), S.Integers)
    c = ConditionSet(x, Contains(y, Interval(-1, 1)), base)
    actual = c.subs(y, Rational(1, 3))
    expected = base.subs(y, Rational(1, 3))
    print(expr, '\\n actual  ', actual, '\\n expected', expected, '\\n equal   ', actual == expected, '\\n')
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import ConditionSet, Contains, ImageSet, Interval, Lambda, Rational, S, Symbol, asin, pi
x, y, n = map(Symbol, 'xyn')
for expr in [n*pi, n*pi + asin(y), 2*n*pi + asin(y), n**2 + y, n*y + pi]:
    base = ImageSet(Lambda(n, expr), S.Integers)
    c = ConditionSet(x, Contains(y, Interval(-1, 1)), base)
    actual = c.subs(y, Rational(1, 3))
    expected = base.subs(y, Rational(1, 3))
    print(expr, '\\n actual  ', actual, '\\n expected', expected, '\\n equal   ', actual == expected, '\\n')
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '208,265p' sympy/sets/conditionset.py; rg -n \"if cond is S.true|ConditionSet\\(new, Contains|Contains\\(new, base\" -S . --glob '*.py'"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
x,y,n,z=symbols('x y n z')
base=imageset(Lambda(n,2*n*pi+asin(y)),S.Integers)
c=ConditionSet(x,Contains(y,Interval(-1,1)),base)
q=Rational(1,3)
cond=c.condition.subs(y,q)
b=c.base_set.subs(y,q)
r=ConditionSet(q,Contains(q,b),b)
print('c.args:', repr(c.args))
print('condition ->', repr(cond), cond is S.true)
print('base ->', repr(b), 'free=', b.free_symbols)
print('special result:', repr(r))
print('special args:', repr(r.args))
print('special free:', r.free_symbols)
print('natural rebuild:', repr(ConditionSet(c.sym,cond,b)))
print('base itself:', repr(b))
print('condition xreplace check:', Contains(q,b).xreplace({q:Dummy('lambda')}), Contains(q,b).xreplace({q:Dummy('lambda')}).free_symbols)
for new in (q,z,pi,S.Zero):
    c2=ConditionSet(x, Eq(y,new) if new "'!= y else S.true, b)
print('"'base contains q:', b.contains(q))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
x,y,n,z=symbols('x y n z')
base=imageset(Lambda(n,2*n*pi+asin(y)),S.Integers)
c=ConditionSet(x,Contains(y,Interval(-1,1)),base)
q=Rational(1,3)
cond=c.condition.subs(y,q)
b=c.base_set.subs(y,q)
r=ConditionSet(q,Contains(q,b),b)
print('c.args:', repr(c.args))
print('condition ->', repr(cond), cond is S.true)
print('base ->', repr(b), 'free=', b.free_symbols)
print('special result:', repr(r))
print('special args:', repr(r.args))
print('special free:', r.free_symbols)
print('natural rebuild:', repr(ConditionSet(c.sym,cond,b)))
print('base itself:', repr(b))
print('condition xreplace check:', Contains(q,b).xreplace({q:Dummy('lambda')}), Contains(q,b).xreplace({q:Dummy('lambda')}).free_symbols)
for new in (q,z,pi,S.Zero):
    c2=ConditionSet(x, Eq(y,new) if new "'!= y else S.true, b)
print('"'base contains q:', b.contains(q))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import ConditionSet, Contains, ImageSet, Interval, Lambda, S, Symbol, pi
x,y,n = map(Symbol,'xyn')
for expr,new in [(pi*n+2*y,S.Half),(pi*n+y+1,S.Half),(pi*n+y, S.One/3),(n*y+pi,S.One/3)]:
 b=ImageSet(Lambda(n,expr),S.Integers)
 c=ConditionSet(x,Contains(y,Interval(-1,1)),b)
 print(expr,new,c.subs(y,new),b.subs(y,new),c.subs(y,new)==b.subs(y,new))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import ConditionSet, Contains, ImageSet, Interval, Lambda, S, Symbol, pi
x,y,n = map(Symbol,'xyn')
for expr,new in [(pi*n+2*y,S.Half),(pi*n+y+1,S.Half),(pi*n+y, S.One/3),(n*y+pi,S.One/3)]:
 b=ImageSet(Lambda(n,expr),S.Integers)
 c=ConditionSet(x,Contains(y,Interval(-1,1)),b)
 print(expr,new,c.subs(y,new),b.subs(y,new),c.subs(y,new)==b.subs(y,new))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1680,1775p' sympy/core/function.py; rg -n \"class ConditionSet|bound_symbols =|def bound_symbols\" "'$(git ls-files '"'sympy/**/*.py') | head -120; ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
x,y,n=symbols('x y n')
q=S.One/3
img=imageset(Lambda(n,2*n*pi+asin(y)),S.Integers)
c=ConditionSet(x,Contains(y,Interval(-1,1)),img)
d=Dummy('subs_d'); m=Dummy('subs_m')
mid=c._subs(y,d*m,hack2=True)
print('direct _subs with placeholder:', repr(mid))
print('then xreplace:', repr(mid.xreplace({d:q,m:S.One})))
print('direct xreplace:', repr(c.xreplace({y:q})))
print('ConditionSet has bound_symbols?', hasattr(c,'bound_symbols'))
print('Lambda bound/free:', img.lamda.bound_symbols, img.lamda.free_symbols)
print('ConditionSet free:', c.free_symbols)
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1680,1775p' sympy/core/function.py; rg -n \"class ConditionSet|bound_symbols =|def bound_symbols\" "'$(git ls-files '"'sympy/**/*.py') | head -120; ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
x,y,n=symbols('x y n')
q=S.One/3
img=imageset(Lambda(n,2*n*pi+asin(y)),S.Integers)
c=ConditionSet(x,Contains(y,Interval(-1,1)),img)
d=Dummy('subs_d'); m=Dummy('subs_m')
mid=c._subs(y,d*m,hack2=True)
print('direct _subs with placeholder:', repr(mid))
print('then xreplace:', repr(mid.xreplace({d:q,m:S.One})))
print('direct xreplace:', repr(c.xreplace({y:q})))
print('ConditionSet has bound_symbols?', hasattr(c,'bound_symbols'))
print('Lambda bound/free:', img.lamda.bound_symbols, img.lamda.free_symbols)
print('ConditionSet free:', c.free_symbols)
PY"
